examples: A typical lion tamer in people's mind is an entertainer holding a whip and a chair.
When a lion tamer holds a chair in front of the lion's face, the lion tries to focus on all four legs of the chair at the same time.
Baran, whom I only knew as a legend, led the meeting like a lion tamer.
Those that offer high-end, high profile phones---think Apple--are profiting while tamer brands, such as Kyocera, sink.
